_comment: Known-false (or deliberately benign) spans appended to the note field at eval time. Applied in-memory only; source dataset is never mutated. Each hallucination is something NOT present in that record's transcript or FHIR (verified). The benign case is a faithful paraphrase the system must NOT flag.

12.span: Started atorvastatin 20 mg daily for hyperlipidemia.
12.label: hallucination
12.rationale: No statin in the transcript or chart; hyperlipidemia never discussed.

12.span: Referred to cardiology for further evaluation.
12.label: hallucination
12.rationale: No cardiology referral discussed anywhere in the visit.

12.span: The patient will begin a low-dose antihypertensive regimen.
12.label: benign
12.rationale: Faithful paraphrase of the real plan (lisinopril/amlodipine/HCTZ started today). Must NOT be flagged.

6.label: hallucination
6.rationale: Metformin is never mentioned in the transcript.

10.span: Started warfarin 5 mg daily for atrial fibrillation.
10.label: hallucination
10.rationale: Anticoagulant never discussed; no atrial fibrillation; not in chart. High-risk hallucination.
